title: 150 Coloured Nappy Bags with Tie Handles, Fragranced for Eliminating Odours, Durable and Leak-proof, Light-weight and Perfect for Babies Travel Bags
features: 👶🏼 🍼 🧸👶? 150 TIE HANDLED FRAGRANCED NAPPY BAGS, 28CM (11") X 31CM (12.2") - 150 nappy bags included in each pack, you'll always have a fresh, fragranced bag on hand to dispose of soiled nappies. Perfect size and holds newborn to toddler training sized nappies

👶🏼 🍼 🧸👶🏾 TIE HANDLES FOR EASY SEALING AND ODOUR CONTROL - The bags are designed with tie handles, making it easy to securely seal and dispose of used nappies without any mess or fuss.The tie handles help contain odours securely, ensuring that your nursery stays fresher for longer

👶🏼 🍼 🧸👶🏾 PLEASANTLY FRAGRANCED AND COLOURED BAGS - The bags are fragranced with a light, pleasant scent, helping to neutralise unpleasant odours and keep your home smelling fresh and clean. The bags are also coloured to subtly disguise the contents of the bag

👶🏼 🍼 🧸👶🏾 STRONG, DURABLE AND LEAKPROOF - Made from high-quality, durable materials, ensuring that they are strong enough to hold even the heaviest nappies without tearing or leaking. They are also designed to be compact and easy to store, so you can keep them close at hand wherever you need them

👶🏼 🍼 🧸👶🏾 LIGHTWEIGHT, DISPOSABLE AND PERFECT FOR TRAVEL BAGS - The lightweight, compact nature of the bags make them perfect for baby bags, suitcases and storing discreetly. Perfect solution for convenient, hygienic, and odor-free nappy disposal
description: Product Description Great for Travel! Helps Eliminate Odours A great companion for parents on the move! Crafted with care to simplify your nappy-changing routine, these bags are thoughtfully designed to make outings with your little one a breeze. The tie handles ensure quick and secure closure, letting you dispose of used nappy's with ease and no mess. Worried about odors? Fear not! Our nappy bags come infused with a pleasant fragrance that swiftly eliminates any unwanted scents, ensuring a fresh and enjoyable experience for both you and your baby.
